name: Prismo Metals Inc.
summary: Prismo Metals Inc. acquires, explores for, and develops mineral properties in Mexico. It has an option to acquire a 75% interest in the Palos Verdes property that includes Palos Verdes concession covering an area of 22.7707 hectares located in the southern part of the State of Sinaloa in northwestern Mexico; and an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Los Pavitos property located in the state of Sonora, Mexico. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
